text: From: noreply@austinmdc.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Appointment reminder — Dr. Okafor | Body summary: Reminder: you have an appointment with Dr. Okafor on Feb 5 at 10:00am at Austin Movement Disorder Center. Please arrive 10 minutes early and bring your medication list.

From: noreply@northstarpt.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Physical therapy session reminder | Body summary: Reminder: your PT session is scheduled for Feb 8 at 2:00pm with therapist Ryan Morris. Focus: gait and balance. Please wear comfortable shoes.

From: noreply@austinspeech.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Speech therapy session reminder | Body summary: Reminder: your LSVT LOUD session is Feb 12 at 11:00am. Please complete your daily voice exercises before the session.

From: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Sofia's valentine cards | Body summary: Hey babe, Sofia wants to make valentines for her class tomorrow morning. I got the supplies. Can you help her with the stickers while I make breakfast? Love you.
From: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | To: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Re: Sofia's valentine cards | Body summary: yeah of course. sounds fun

From: noreply@ymca-northaustin.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Rock Steady Boxing — class reminder | Body summary: Reminder: Rock Steady Boxing class is Friday Feb 16 at 10:00am. Bring gloves and water. See you there!

From: noreply@northstarpt.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Physical therapy session reminder | Body summary: Reminder: your PT session is scheduled for Feb 22 at 2:00pm. Focus: upper limb coordination. Please bring your exercise log.

From: noreply@ymca-northaustin.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Rock Steady Boxing — class reminder | Body summary: Reminder: Rock Steady Boxing class is Friday Mar 1 at 10:00am. Bring gloves and water. See you there!

From: yopd-group@dellmed.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Young Onset PD support group — March meeting | Body summary: Our monthly meeting is Saturday Mar 9 at 2pm in the Dell Medical Center conference room. This month's topic: staying active at work with PD. Light refreshments provided.

From: manager@vaultcreative.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Standup schedule update | Body summary: Hi Daniel, we're moving standups to every other Wednesday at 9:30am starting Mar 13. Voice-only is fine as always. Let me know if this works for your therapy schedule.
From: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | To: manager@vaultcreative.com | Subject: Re: Standup schedule update | Body summary: works for me thanks

From: rxalerts@heb.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Prescription ready for pickup | Body summary: Your prescriptions for pramipexole and rasagiline are ready at HEB Pharmacy Parmer Lane. Total copay: $62.00. Please pick up by Mar 27.

From: noreply@northstarot.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Occupational therapy session reminder | Body summary: Reminder: your OT session is Mar 25 at 10:00am with therapist Amy Park. Focus: adaptive tech and tremor strategies.

From: ridgetop@aisd.org | To: elena.kowalski@gmail.com, daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Talent show — April 6 | Body summary: Dear families, the annual talent show is this Saturday April 6 at 6pm in the gymnasium. Students should arrive by 5:30pm. Seating is first come first served.

From: yopd-group@dellmed.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Young Onset PD support group — April meeting | Body summary: Our monthly meeting is Saturday Apr 13 at 2pm. This month's topic: managing relationships after diagnosis. All welcome. Bring a partner or family member if you'd like.

From: yopd-group@dellmed.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Young Onset PD support group — May meeting | Body summary: Our monthly meeting is Saturday May 11 at 2pm. This month's topic: exercise and neuroplasticity — what the research says. Guest speaker from UT Neuroscience.

From: ridgetop@aisd.org | To: elena.kowalski@gmail.com, daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: End-of-year recital — May 20 | Body summary: Dear families, the end-of-year recital is Monday May 20 at 3:30pm in the auditorium. Students in Ms. Chen's class should wear white tops.

From: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Sofia's recital outfit | Body summary: I found a white blouse for Sofia at Target. Also got her new tights. Can you pick her up from after-care on Monday so we go straight to the recital? I'll meet you there from work.
From: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | To: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Re: Sofia's recital outfit | Body summary: yes i'll get her. see you there

From: alerts@chase.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Payment received — thank you | Body summary: Thank you. Your payment of $150 has been received. Current balance: $3,063.91. Next statement closes Jun 25.

From: manager@vaultcreative.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Project update needed | Body summary: Hi Daniel, can you give a voice update on the Meridian project status during Wednesday's standup? Just 2-3 minutes on where things stand. No slides needed.
From: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | To: manager@vaultcreative.com | Subject: Re: Project update needed | Body summary: sure i'll have it ready

From: noreply@northaustinfm.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Appointment reminder — Dr. Mendez | Body summary: Reminder: your annual checkup with Dr. Mendez is Jun 10 at 10:30am. Please bring your insurance card and current medication list.

From: yopd-group@dellmed.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Young Onset PD support group — June meeting | Body summary: Our monthly meeting is Saturday Jun 15 at 2pm. This month's topic: workplace accommodations and disclosure decisions. All welcome.

From: alerts@chase.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Your statement is ready | Body summary: Your monthly statement is available. Balance: $2,945.33. Minimum payment of $59 due by Jul 10. Log in to view details.

From: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Barton Springs Saturday? | Body summary: Weather looks great Saturday. Want to take Sofia to Barton Springs in the morning? I'll pack snacks and sunscreen. We could do 9am before it gets too crowded.
From: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | To: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Re: Barton Springs Saturday? | Body summary: yes lets do it. 9 is good

From: yopd-group@dellmed.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Young Onset PD support group — July meeting | Body summary: Our monthly meeting is Saturday Jul 20 at 2pm. This month's topic: medication management and wearing-off patterns. Guest pharmacist from UT Health.

From: manager@vaultcreative.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Quick check-in | Body summary: Hey Daniel, just wanted to check how the voice-to-text workflow is going for the project notes. If you need any other tools or accommodations let me know. No rush on a reply.
From: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | To: manager@vaultcreative.com | Subject: Re: Quick check-in | Body summary: its going ok. the dictation works pretty well for notes. thanks for checking

From: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Halloween costumes | Body summary: Sofia wants to be a dinosaur. I found a costume at Spirit Halloween for $25. Good? Also what are you wearing — boxing gloves and a robe? :) We leave at 5:30 Thursday.
From: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | To: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Re: Halloween costumes | Body summary: haha yes get it. i'll figure something out

From: manager@vaultcreative.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Year-end review schedule | Body summary: Hi Daniel, your year-end review is tentatively set for December. No prep needed yet — just a heads up. We'll talk about how the part-time arrangement is working and any adjustments for next year.

From: yopd-group@dellmed.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Young Onset PD support group — November meeting | Body summary: Our monthly meeting is Saturday Nov 16 at 2pm. This month's topic: holiday planning when energy is limited. All welcome.

From: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Thanksgiving plan | Body summary: My parents are coming Thursday around 11. Mom is bringing the turkey and pie. Can you handle the music and setting the table with Sofia? I'll do the rest. Don't stress about it.
From: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | To: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Re: Thanksgiving plan | Body summary: sounds good. we got this

From: yopd-group@dellmed.org | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Young Onset PD support group — holiday gathering | Body summary: Join us for our annual holiday gathering Saturday Dec 21 at 2pm. Potluck style — bring a dish if you can. Families and caregivers welcome.

From: elena.kowalski@gmail.com | To: daniel.kowalski@gmail.com | Subject: Merry Christmas babe | Body summary: I know you're right next to me but I wanted to write this down. Watching you with Sofia this morning was everything. You're an amazing dad. I love you so much. Merry Christmas.
